name: Clearout AI
description: AI-powered household inventory and listing app. Users upload photos of items, AI extracts metadata, and app helps organize keep/sell/donate decisions with AI-generated listing drafts.
purpose: This is a learning project for a summer internship recruiting prep. Prioritize learning and explaining every line of code.
instructionsForClaude: This student is learning software engineering. For EVERY code you generate: (1) Explain what it does, (2) Walk through it line by line, (3) Explain the why behind design decisions, (4) Show alternatives and tradeoffs, (5) Ask if they understand before moving on. Learning is the goal, not speed.

techStack.database: Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security (RLS)

keyArchitectureDecisions: Async job pipeline: AI processing happens in background, not on user request
RLS on all tables: Each user can only see their own data at database level
Zod validation: All AI outputs and user inputs validated against schemas
Structured extraction: AI returns JSON that matches a schema
learningGoals: Learn React hooks and state management
Learn how to call external APIs safely
Master error handling and edge cases
